summary: Tested 3 UI fixes on admin dashboard (mobile viewport 375x812): 1) Call Requests tab - PASS - flex-wrap applied, no orange scrollbar 2) Food Stores tab - CANNOT VERIFY - no pending stores exist to show documents 3) Delivery Settings tab - PASS - Category filter tabs visible and clickable but filtering NOT implemented yet

issues: Category filter tabs are visible and clickable, but actual content filtering by category is NOT yet implemented - all sections show regardless of selected tab

action_items: Implement actual content filtering by category in DeliverySettingsTab.js - currently tabs change activeCategory state but content doesn't filter based on selection
critical_code_review_comments: FoodStoresTab.js: Documents section (lines 241-296) is correctly implemented to show store_photo, license_photo, health_certificate, id_photo when store.is_approved is false, but could not be visually verified as there are 0 pending stores

DeliverySettingsTab.js: Category tabs UI is added (lines 498-527) but the content sections don't have conditional rendering based on activeCategory - all sections display regardless of which tab is selected

call_requests_scrollbar_fix.details: flex-wrap class applied to filters div, no overflow-x-auto found, no horizontal scrollbar visible on mobile viewport
call_requests_scrollbar_fix.code_verified: Line 152 of CallRequestsTab.js shows 'flex gap-2 flex-wrap'

food_stores_documents.details: 0 pending stores in the system to test document display. Code implementation verified at lines 241-296 of FoodStoresTab.js
food_stores_documents.code_verified: Documents grid with store_photo, license_photo, health_certificate, id_photo is implemented for !store.is_approved

delivery_settings_category_tabs.details: 6 category tabs visible: الكل, الأسعار, الأوقات, الطلبات, العقوبات, المكافآت. Tabs are clickable and active state changes visually. Content filtering NOT implemented.
delivery_settings_category_tabs.code_verified: Category buttons and activeCategory state implemented at lines 498-527

context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 bug fixes verified: 1) CallRequestsTab uses flex-wrap instead of overflow-x-auto to prevent scrollbar 2) FoodStoresTab has documents grid but no pending stores to test 3) DeliverySettingsTab has category filter UI but needs filtering logic implementation
